2604.10073.title: Graph-RHO: Critical-path-aware Heterogeneous Graph Network for Long-Horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling
2604.10073.paper_summary: Long-horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling~(FJSP) presents a formidable combinatorial challenge due to complex, interdependent decisions spanning extended time horizons. While learning-based Rolling Horizon Optimization~(RHO) has emerged as a promising paradigm to accelerate solving by identifying and fixing invariant operations, its effectiveness is hindered by the structural complexity of FJSP. Existing methods often fail to capture intricate graph-structured dependencies and ignore the asymmetric costs of prediction errors, in which misclassifying critical-path operations is significantly more detrimental than misclassifying non-critical ones. Furthermore, dynamic shifts in predictive confidence during the rolling process make static pruning thresholds inadequate. To address these limitations, we propose Graph-RHO, a novel critical-path-aware graph-based RHO framework. First, we introduce a topology-aware heterogeneous graph network that encodes subproblems as operation-machine graphs with multi-relational edges, leveraging edge-feature-aware message passing to predict operation stability. Second, we incorporate a critical-path-aware mechanism that injects inductive biases during training to distinguish highly sensitive bottleneck operations from robust ones. Third, we devise an adaptive thresholding strategy that dynamically calibrates decision boundaries based on online uncertainty estimation to align model predictions with the solver's search space. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that \mbox{Graph-RHO} establishes a new state of the art in solution quality and computational efficiency. Remarkably, it exhibits exceptional zero-shot generalization, reducing solve time by over 30\% on large-scale instances (2000 operations) while achieving superior solution quality. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/IntelliSensing/Graph-RHO}{here}.
2604.10073.paper_summary_zh: 長期靈活工作車間排程（FJSP）因為複雜且相互依賴的決策跨越長時間範圍而呈現出可怕的組合挑戰。雖然基於學習的滾動視野優化（RHO）已成為一種有前景的範式，通過識別和修正不變操作來加速求解，但其有效性受到FJSP結構複雜性的阻礙。現有方法往往無法捕捉複雜的圖結構依賴關係，並忽略預測錯誤的非對稱成本，其中錯誤分類關鍵路徑操作的損害遠大於錯誤分類非關鍵操作的損害。此外，在滾動過程中預測信心的動態變化使得靜態修剪閾值不再適用。為了應對這些限制，我們提出了Graph-RHO，一種新穎的關鍵路徑感知圖基RHO框架。首先，我們引入了一種拓撲感知的異質圖網絡，將子問題編碼為具有多關係邊的操作-機器圖，利用邊特徵感知的消息傳遞來預測操作穩定性。其次，我們納入了一種關鍵路徑感知機制，在訓練過程中注入歸納偏見，以區分高度敏感的瓶頸操作與穩健操作。第三，我們設計了一種自適應閾值策略，根據在線不確定性估計動態校準決策邊界，以使模型預測與求解器的搜索空間對齊。在標準基準上的廣泛實驗表明，\mbox{Graph-RHO}在解決方案質量和計算效率方面建立了新的最先進水平。值得注意的是，它展現出卓越的零-shot泛化能力，在大規模實例（2000個操作）上將求解時間減少超過30\%，同時實現了更優的解決方案質量。我們的代碼可以在\href{https://github.com/IntelliSensing/Graph-RHO}{這裡}獲得。
2604.10073.author: Yujie Li et.al.
2604.10073.authors: Yujie Li, Jiuniu Wang, Mugen Peng, Guangzuo Li, Wenjia Xu
